description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Asynchronous AI music supervisor for natural-language and image-based catalog matching.

Create a Supe AI music supervisor search. Accepts a natural-language `query`, a `context` describing the scene, and/or up to 11 `asset_ids` (10 images + 1 video). At least one of `query`, `context`, or `asset_ids` is required. `callback_url` (HTTPS) is required for asynchronous delivery. Returns 200 immediately when an equivalent search is cached within 24 hours, otherwise 202 with a search ID; final results arrive via the configured webhook.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Retrieve the current status and results of a Supe search; refreshes signed audio URLs (which expire seven days after generation).
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Reference image and video uploads consumed by Supe Search.

Upload a single reference image or video to be referenced by a later Supe search. Multipart form-data with a required `file` field and optional `content_type` override. Image: JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 20 MB, max 4096 px per axis. Video: MP4/QuickTime/WebM, max 500 MB, max 10 minutes. Processing is asynchronous; the response is 202 with a `pending` asset.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
(Required)
Retrieve the processing state of a previously uploaded asset. Assets are scoped to the requesting API key; references from other keys look like 404.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Server-to-server REST API for the Soundstripe royalty-free music, sound-effects, and AI music supervisor catalog. Responses follow the JSON:API specification. Authentication is token-based via the `Authorization` header. The API rate limit is 25 requests per second per API key; exceeding it returns HTTP 429.

Contact Support:
 Name: Soundstripe API
